request_text: I was charged twice for my last invoice and nobody has responded. This is unacceptable and I want this fixed today.
Can you explain your refund policy and how long support usually takes to respond?
Please activate my new business account and update the billing contact to Priya Menon.
Our service is down during launch day. I need a supervisor immediately or we will escalate this legally.
I need to cancel one seat from our subscription and move the remaining seats to the annual plan.
Your support team has ignored three emails and the issue is still unresolved. I am very disappointed.
I was charged twice, but I also just want the refund policy and pricing details. Please advise what I should do next.
What is your expected response time for general enquiries, and do refund reviews take longer than that?
We detected possible fraud on account ACC-90511. Notify a supervisor immediately and pause automated changes until compliance reviews this.
Need help with the thing we discussed earlier. Please fix ASAP somehow.
